---
title: "TODO: Finding Title"
---

<!-- TODO: Copy and Paste this template for other findings -->

<script>
  // TODO: Update the JSON file paths to match your exported Altair/Vega-Lite chart specifications
  vegaEmbed('#chart1', './charts/placeholder_chart.json', {
    renderer: 'svg',
    actions: false,
  })

  vegaEmbed('#chart2', './charts/scatter_placeholder.json', {
    renderer: 'svg',
    actions: false,
  })
</script>

 <!-- TODO: Update the figure caption accordingly -->

<div id="chart1"></div>
*Figure 1: *

 <!-- TODO: Explain the significance of the plot -->

<div id="chart2"></div>
*Figure 2: *
